---
title: "Inside Philanthropy"
page-layout: article
---

# Inside Philanthropy

## Description

News and information platform covering foundations, major donors, grantmaking, philanthropy jobs, and funding opportunities. Supports research on philanthropy and nonprofit funding.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Social Sciences, News & Media
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, News & Current Events, Workforce & Career Data
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, News & Current Events, Workforce & Career Data

## Access notes

Requires users to register for an individual account.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-inside-philanthropy)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
